features.title: Interactive spec review in /harness:start
steps: start.md has a review loop between planner output and initializer spawn
Review loop shows spec content (overview, shipped scope, execution strategy, security context)
Modify re-invokes planner with user feedback
Only after approval does initializer spawn
Step numbering is consistent after insertion

features.title: Interactive contract review in /harness:session
steps: session.md has a review loop between generator proposal and evaluator review
Review loop shows proposal content (goal, deliverables, contract checks)
Modify re-invokes generator with user feedback
Only after approval does evaluator review proceed
Sprint Resume table step numbers updated
Existing evaluator contract review step preserved

features.title: Document interactive review points in CLAUDE.md
steps: CLAUDE.md has Interactive Review Points section
Section documents both review loops with rationale
